queries: يحرم من الرضاع ما يحرم من النسب مصدر صحيح البخاري مسلم رقم الحديث
حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُكُمْ الآية 23 النساء نص الآية بالرسم العثماني
يحرم بالرضاع ما يحرم بالنسب نص الحديث
وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ المرجع سورة النساء 23 النص
وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ من نسائكم اللاتي دخلتم بهن الآية 23 النساء

output.code: import os, glob, sys, textwrap, json, re, unicodedata, pathlib, itertools
import os, glob, pathlib, sys, json, re, textwrap

files = os.listdir('/mnt/data')
files

path = '/mnt/data/file-BqQdDDCPSFuT8qpprD1U9T-Q123.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]
print(text[2000:4001])

import re

text_len = len(text)
# Find all between double quotes
quote_spans = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text)]
quote_spans[:10], len(quote_spans)

# Find the start index of the truncated phrase including the quote mark
frag = '"وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي د'
start_idx = text.find(frag)
start_idx, text[start_idx:start_idx+100]

end_idx = start_idx + len(frag)
end_idx, text[end_idx-50:end_idx]

phrase1 = 'يحرم بالرضاع ما يحرم بالنسب'
positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phrase1), text)]
positions

paren_citations = []
for m in re.finditer(r'قال تعالى:\s*\(([^)]+)\)', text):
    paren_citations.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)))
paren_citations

# Find 'قال تعالى: ' followed by text then '{النساء:23}'
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'قال تعالى:\s*([^\n]+)\{النساء:23\}', text):
    spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1).strip()))
spans

# Verify slicing for first quote
start, end, quoted = quote_spans[0]
inner = text[start+1:end-1]
len(inner), inner[:30], inner[-30:]

frag_start = 1412+1
frag_end = 1483
frag_text = text[frag_start:frag_end]
frag_text

start2, end2, verse2 = spans[0]
text[start2:end2][:20], text[start2:end2][-20:], len(text[start2:end2])

phrase2 = 'خمس رضعات معلومات'
positions2 = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phrase2), text)]
positions2

pos = positions2[0]
text[pos-40:pos+len(phrase2)+40]

citations = []

# 1. Full ayah first quote
start, end, quoted = quote_spans[0]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start+1,
    "span_end": end-1,
    "span_text": text[start+1:end-1],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 23},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ وَعَمَّاتُكُمْ وَخَالَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُ الْأَخِ وَبَنَاتُ الْأُخْتِ وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ وَأُمَّهَاتُ نِسَائِكُمْ وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُونُوا دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَحَلَائِلُ أَبْنَائِكُمُ الَّذِينَ مِنْ أَصْلَابِكُمْ وَأَنْ تَجْمَعُوا بَيْنَ الْأُخْتَيْنِ إِلَّا مَا قَدْ سَلَفَ ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 2. Short excerpt quote
start, end, quoted = quote_spans[1]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start+1,
    "span_end": end-1,
    "span_text": text[start+1:end-1],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 23},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 3. Truncated fragment quote
frag_start = 1412 + 1
frag_end = 1483
citations.append({
    "span_start": frag_start,
    "span_end": frag_end,
    "span_text": text[frag_start:frag_end],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 23},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 4. Full ayah after 'قال تعالى:' with {النساء:23}
start2, end2, verse2 = spans[0]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start2,
    "span_end": end2,
    "span_text": text[start2:end2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 23},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ وَعَمَّاتُكُمْ وَخَالَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُ الْأَخِ وَبَنَاتُ الْأُخْتِ وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ وَأُمَّهَاتُ نِسَائِكُمْ وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُونُوا دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَحَلَائِلُ أَبْنَائِكُمُ الَّذِينَ مِنْ أَصْلَابِكُمْ وَأَنْ تَجْمَعُوا بَيْنَ الْأُخْتَيْنِ إِلَّا مَا قَدْ سَلَفَ ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 5. Parenthetical verse in [2]
start3, end3, verse3 = paren_citations[0]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start3,
    "span_end": end3,
    "span_text": text[start3:end3],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 23},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ وَعَمَّاتُكُمْ وَخَالَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُ الْأَخِ وَبَنَاتُ الْأُخْتِ وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ وَأُمَّهَاتُ نِسَائِكُمْ وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُونُوا دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَحَلَائِلُ أَبْنَائِكُمُ الَّذِينَ مِنْ أَصْلَابِكُمْ وَأَنْ تَجْمِعُوا بَيْنَ الْأُخْتَيْنِ إِلَّا مَا قَدْ سَلَفَ ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 6. Hadith phrase occurrences (two)
for pos in positions:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": pos,
        "span_end": pos + len(phrase1),
        "span_text": text[pos: pos + len(phrase1)],
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": True,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {"collection_name": "Jami` at-Tirmidhi", "book_number": 12, "hadith_number": 1146},
        "corrected_text": "يَحْرُمُ مِنَ الرَّضَاعِ مَا يَحْرُمُ مِنَ النَّسَبِ",
        "completely_invalid": False
    })

# 7. Five known sucklings phrase
pos = positions2[0]
citations.append({
    "span_start": pos,
    "span_end": pos + len(phrase2),
    "span_text": text[pos: pos + len(phrase2)],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {"collection_name": "Sahih Muslim", "book_number": 17, "hadith_number": 1452},
    "corrected_text": "نَزَلَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ عَشْرُ رَضَعَاتٍ مَعْلُومَاتٍ ثُمَّ نَزَلَ أَيْضًا خَمْسٌ مَعْلُومَاتٌ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

len(citations)

standard_ayah = citations[0]["corrected_text"]
citations[4]["corrected_text"] = standard_ayah
citations[3]["corrected_text"] = standard_ayah
# verify equality
citations[3]["corrected_text"] == citations[0]["corrected_text"] == citations[4]["corrected_text"]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
